personas.name: Frustrated Filer
personas.description: A user who is frustrated with the cost and subscription model of the app, seeking affordable mental health support.
goals: Find an affordable mental health support app
Understand the costs and subscription models before committing
pain_points: Limited access to features without a paid subscription
context: Reading reviews and comparing features and prices
constraints: Limited budget for mental health support

personas.name: UX Enthusiast
personas.description: A user who values a seamless and intuitive app experience, with a focus on functionality and user experience.
goals: Find an app with a user-friendly interface
Easily navigate and use the app's features
pain_points: Difficulties with app navigation and usability
context: Using the app daily to track mental health
Exploring different app features and settings
constraints: Expectations for a modern and responsive app design

personas.name: Mental Health Advocate
personas.description: A user who seeks comprehensive mental health insights and support, with a focus on tracking and understanding their mental well-being.
goals: Gain a deeper understanding of their mental health
Track and monitor their mental well-being over time
pain_points: Limited insights or feedback on mental health
Insufficient tracking features or data analysis
Lack of personalized recommendations or support
context: Using the app to track mental health daily
Seeking support and guidance for mental health concerns
constraints: Limited knowledge about mental health and wellness
Expectations for evidence-based and reliable information

personas.name: Tech-Savvy Troubleshooter
personas.description: A user who encounters technical issues and bugs, seeking a stable and reliable app experience.
goals: Find a stable and reliable app experience
pain_points: Technical issues with login or account management
Bugs or glitches that hinder app usage
context: Using the app daily and encountering technical issues
constraints: Expectations for a stable and reliable app experience

personas.name: Clinical Connector
personas.description: A user who seeks professional and clinical integration, with a focus on connecting with therapists or healthcare professionals.
goals: Connect with a therapist or healthcare professional
Find an app that integrates with clinical services
pain_points: Difficulty finding a therapist or healthcare professional
context: Seeking professional help for mental health concerns
Researching apps that integrate with clinical services
constraints: Limited knowledge about clinical services and integration
Expectations for secure and confidential communication
